rules.specExclusivity: Only one spec tree (Sanguine/Accursed/Eternal/Fleshweaver-equivalent) can be active at a time in-game. You commit to ONE non-Class tree and spend your full Talent Essence budget within it (plus the separate Class tree spent with Ability Essence). Treat trees other than 'Class' as mutually exclusive choices, not a blend.
rules.partialRanksCount: A node only needs 1 point invested (not maxPoints) to count as 'connected' for prerequisite checks and to contribute toward the reqTreeAbilityEssence/reqTreeTalentEssence row-unlock thresholds.
rules.budgetCurrencies: Ability Essence (AE) is spent only in the Class tree. Talent Essence (TE) is spent only in whichever single spec tree you commit to. A node's abilityEssenceCost/talentEssenceCost fields show which currency it draws from (never both).
rules.rowGating: reqTreeAbilityEssence / reqTreeTalentEssence on a node is the minimum essence already spent within that SAME tree required to unlock it - not total across trees.
rules.levelGates: Some nodes (mostly entryType Ability) cost 0 essence and unlock automatically at requiredLevel instead of being a budget choice.
rules.prerequisiteFieldsCorrected: 'prerequisites' is the OR-logic grid-connection requirement (matches tooltip 'requires one connected node: A or B or C') - need at least 1 point in ANY ONE listed node. 'specialRequirement' is a separate, rare, AND-logic hard requirement used only by a handful of free/level-gated bonus nodes - ALL listed nodes must already have a point.
rules.budgetTotalsAssumed: Verified live for Bloodmage: 26 Ability Essence (Class tree) / 25 Talent Essence (spec tree) as the spendable caps. Assumed identical for all classes since this is tied to character leveling, not class design - not independently verified per class. Override in the toolkit if a specific class differs.
rules.referencedTerms: Extracted from colored in-line spans in the raw tooltip HTML (e.g. a description that highlights 'Cursed Blood' or 'Bloodbolt'). These are explicit developer-authored callouts to another spell/buff/mechanic name, and are the strongest available signal for detecting mechanical synergy between talents - stronger than plain keyword text matching.

talents.name: Chainwhip
talents.description:
Swing a chain at an enemy dealing 8 + 45% AP + 25% SP Physical damage and silencing them for 2 seconds, generating a large amount of threat.

If you successfully interrupt an enemy, this will refund 20% of the cooldown.

talents.name: Doom
talents.description:
Transforms your Greater Imp into a Doomguard for 12 seconds.

While transformed, your Doomguard deals 20% more damage, and its auto attacks ignite the target, dealing 10% of the damage dealt as Fire damage over 6 seconds, stacking 6 times.

rankDescriptions.description:
Transforms your Greater Imp into a Doomguard for 12 seconds.

While transformed, your Doomguard deals 20% more damage, and its auto attacks ignite the target, dealing 10% of the damage dealt as Fire damage over 6 seconds, stacking 6 times.

rankDescriptions.description:

talents.name: Evil Duo
talents.description:
Level 50 Passive
Unleashing a Pestilence now causes your Greater Imp to unleash it's Pestilence.

The Imp's unleash effect is equivalent to your own unleash effect for the equivalent Pestilence.

rankDescriptions.description:
Level 50 Passive

The Imp's unleash effect is equivalent to your own unleash effect for the equivalent Pestilence.

talents.name: Hellstorm
talents.description:
Create a hellstorm, dealing 77 + 32.04% fire SP + 8% AP Fire damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

Embers then flare every 1 sec for 2 seconds, dealing 28 + 2.5% fire SP + 2.5% AP Fire damage.

Duration is increased by 100% for each stack of Demonfire consumed.

rankDescriptions.description:
Create a hellstorm, dealing 77 + 32.04% fire SP + 8% AP Fire damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

Embers then flare every 1 sec for 2 seconds, dealing 28 + 2.5% fire SP + 2.5% AP Fire damage.

Duration is increased by 100% for each stack of Demonfire consumed.

talents.name: Ascended Warlock
talents.description:
Your Skulltaker used with 6 stacks of Demonfire now reduces the cooldown of Doom by -5 seconds.

In addition, while Doom is active, your Doomguard will now copy your Skulltaker, dealing reduced damage.

rankDescriptions.description:
Your Skulltaker used with 6 stacks of Demonfire now reduces the cooldown of Doom by -5 seconds.

In addition, while Doom is active, your Doomguard will now copy your Skulltaker, dealing reduced damage.

talents.name: Fury of Xoroth
talents.description:
Infernal Strike now grants you a stack of Xorothian Fury, increasing the chance for your next Skulltaker within 10 seconds to critically strike by 10% per stack, up to 3 stacks.

Additionally, using Skulltaker with 6 stacks of Demonfire grants you Xorothian Rage, causing your next Infernal Strike within 10 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

rankDescriptions.description:
Infernal Strike now grants you a stack of Xorothian Fury, increasing the chance for your next Skulltaker within 10 seconds to critically strike by 10% per stack, up to 3 stacks.

Additionally, using Skulltaker with 6 stacks of Demonfire grants you Xorothian Rage, causing your next Infernal Strike within 10 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.

talents.name: Warbringer
talents.description:
Transforms your Flames of Xoroth into Warbringer.WarbringerSlam the ground, dealing 65% Weapon Damage plus 2 to nearby enemies, reducing the effectiveness of any healing by -50% for 10 seconds.

Deals increased damage per Demonfire consumed.

rankDescriptions.description:
Transforms your Flames of Xoroth into Warbringer.WarbringerSlam the ground, dealing 65% Weapon Damage plus 2 to nearby enemies, reducing the effectiveness of any healing by -50% for 10 seconds.

talents.name: Demonic Blade

At the end of the duration, or when all stacks are consumed, you instantly cast Meatsaw free of cost.

talents.name: Gorged
talents.description:
Gore now heals you for 50% of the damage dealt over 3 sec and grants a stack of Gorged for 30 seconds.

At 3 stacks, your next Sever will consume the stacks to leech an additional 200% of the damage dealt by it from up to 5 enemies within 5 yds.

In addition, Sever now strikes an additional time after 1 sec but has a 2 increased cooldown.

rankDescriptions.description:
Gore now heals you for 50% of the damage dealt over 3 sec and grants a stack of Gorged for 30 seconds.

At 3 stacks, your next Sever will consume the stacks to leech an additional 200% of the damage dealt by it from up to 5 enemies within 5 yds.

In addition, Sever now strikes an additional time after 1 sec but has a 2 increased cooldown.

talents.name: Hellknight
